actions.narration: Okay, landing on the Tasks page. Hmm, URL is dreamduo.netlify.app. Looks like a tasks/project management app. Let's see what it can do.

I need to create an account first. I don't see a create account button, but it says 'Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps.' at the bottom, so maybe it thinks I'm already logged in? I guess I'll try to sign out and see if a create account option appears.
Clicking 'Sign Out' to see if I can create a new account.

Okay, now that I've signed out (presumably), I'll look for the email/password creation. Actually, after logging out, I'm not directed to a page where I can create a new account. The task says to create an account using email/password but I can't see any option to do so.
The task also says to log in with Google account, let's try that, assuming there is an option for google login
If I were able to log in, I'd navigate to the Mission Dashboard and see how tasks are managed. Since I can't find login option, that's blocked
If I were a Danchou with team members to manage, I would look for functionality related to managing other users/missions. Since I can't find login option, that's blocked

friction_points: No obvious email/password login after logging out.
Unable to complete tasks due to lack of account creation/login options.
